requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Household Refrigerating Appliances (INMETRO minimum efficiency + ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / IEC 62552)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——家用制冷器具（INMETRO最低能效 + ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / IEC 62552）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——家用製冷器具（INMETRO最低能效 + ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / IEC 62552）

summary.en: Energy performance of household refrigerating appliances in Brazil is regulated under INMETRO Portarias within the Brazilian Labelling Programme (PBE, Programa Brasileiro de Etiquetagem) and reinforced by minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) set under the Energy Efficiency Law (Lei 10.295/2001) and CGIEE/INMETRO ordinances. It applies to refrigerators, freezers and refrigerator-freezer combinations. Key requirements include: (1) Minimum energy efficiency levels — appliances must not fall below the minimum class permitted for their category by the governing INMETRO Portaria, with energy consumption assessed against rated volume and configuration; (2) Energy consumption measured by Brazilian-adopted test methods (ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / ABNT NBR IEC 62552 series); (3) Classification into A-to-G efficiency classes for the ENCE label; (4) Certification and test data held by a Brazil-resident certificate holder (CNPJ). The most efficient models may additionally qualify for the Selo PROCEL endorsement. Energy values must be derived under 60 Hz, 127/220 V supply conditions used in Brazil.
summary.zh: 巴西家用制冷器具的能效性能依据INMETRO法令（Portaria）在巴西标识项目（PBE，Programa Brasileiro de Etiquetagem）框架内进行管控，并由依据《能效法》（Lei 10.295/2001）及CGIEE/INMETRO法令设定的最低能效标准（MEPS）强化。适用范围涵盖电冰箱、冷冻箱及冰箱-冷冻箱组合。核心要求包括：（1）最低能效等级——器具不得低于管辖INMETRO法令对其类别允许的最低等级，耗电量按额定容积和配置评估；（2）耗电量须按巴西采用的试验方法（ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / ABNT NBR IEC 62552系列）测量；（3）按A至G能效等级分级以用于ENCE标签；（4）认证及检测数据须由巴西境内证书持有人（CNPJ）持有。最高效型号可另行符合Selo PROCEL认可资格。能效值须在巴西采用的60 Hz、127/220 V供电条件下得出。
summary.zht: 巴西家用製冷器具的能效性能依據INMETRO法令（Portaria）在巴西標識項目（PBE，Programa Brasileiro de Etiquetagem）框架內進行管控，並由依據《能效法》（Lei 10.295/2001）及CGIEE/INMETRO法令設定的最低能效標準（MEPS）強化。適用範圍涵蓋電冰箱、冷凍箱及冰箱-冷凍箱組合。核心要求包括：（1）最低能效等級——器具不得低於管轄INMETRO法令對其類別允許的最低等級，耗電量按額定容積和配置評估；（2）耗電量須按巴西採用的試驗方法（ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / ABNT NBR IEC 62552系列）測量；（3）按A至G能效等級分級以用於ENCE標籤；（4）認證及檢測數據須由巴西境內證書持有人（CNPJ）持有。最高效型號可另行符合Selo PROCEL認可資格。能效值須在巴西採用的60 Hz、127/220 V供電條件下得出。

standards_or_laws: Lei 10.295/2001 (Energy Efficiency Law) and Decreto 4.059/2001 — enabling framework for minimum energy performance standards (MEPS)
INMETRO Portarias for household refrigerating appliances — minimum efficiency levels and labelling rules under the PBE
ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / ABNT NBR IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (Brazilian-adopted measurement standards)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It establishes energy efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits. The standard is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the energy labelling system administered by the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC). Products must display the China Energy Label (CEL) before sale. The GB 12021.2 framework uses a different test methodology and efficiency calculation basis than the Brazilian INMETRO/PBE programme — Chinese energy grades and Brazilian efficiency classes are not directly comparable.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。GB 12021.2为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，能效标识制度由国家发展和改革委员会（NDRC）管理。产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识（CEL）。GB 12021.2框架使用的试验方法及能效计算基准与巴西INMETRO/PBE项目不同——中国能效等级与巴西能效等级不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。GB 12021.2為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，能效標識制度由國家發展和改革委員會（NDRC）管理。產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識（CEL）。GB 12021.2框架使用的試驗方法及能效計算基準與巴西INMETRO/PBE項目不同——中國能效等級與巴西能效等級不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Three major gaps exist between Chinese energy compliance and Brazilian requirements: (1) Different efficiency framework — Brazilian INMETRO Portarias classify appliances into A-to-G classes against Brazilian-adopted test methods and minimum efficiency levels; a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does NOT guarantee compliance with Brazilian minimum levels without independent re-measurement and re-classification. (2) Supply conditions — energy consumption must be determined under Brazil's 127/220 V, 60 Hz conditions; data generated under China's 220 V, 50 Hz may differ, particularly for inverter-compressor models. (3) Certification and labelling — energy data must be filed through an INMETRO-accredited OCP and the ENCE label issued for the Brazilian market; there is no acceptance of the Chinese CEL as a substitute. Measurement to the Brazilian-adopted ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / IEC 62552 method is required, and the certificate holder must be a Brazil-resident entity (CNPJ).
gap.zh: 中国能效合规与巴西要求之间存在三大差距：（1）能效框架不同——巴西INMETRO法令按巴西采用的试验方法和最低能效等级将器具分入A至G等级；中国1级或2级能效评定不等同于符合巴西最低等级，须独立重新测量和重新分级。（2）供电条件——耗电量须在巴西127/220 V、60 Hz条件下确定；在中国220 V、50 Hz条件下生成的数据可能不同，尤其对变频压缩机型号而言。（3）认证与标识——能效数据须通过INMETRO认可的OCP申报，并为巴西市场签发ENCE标签；中国CEL不被接受为替代。须按巴西采用的ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / IEC 62552方法测量，且证书持有人须为巴西境内实体（CNPJ）。
gap.zht: 中國能效合規與巴西要求之間存在三大差距：（1）能效框架不同——巴西INMETRO法令按巴西採用的試驗方法和最低能效等級將器具分入A至G等級；中國1級或2級能效評定不等同於符合巴西最低等級，須獨立重新測量和重新分級。（2）供電條件——耗電量須在巴西127/220 V、60 Hz條件下確定；在中國220 V、50 Hz條件下生成的數據可能不同，尤其對變頻壓縮機型號而言。（3）認證與標識——能效數據須通過INMETRO認可的OCP申報，並為巴西市場簽發ENCE標籤；中國CEL不被接受為替代。須按巴西採用的ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / IEC 62552方法測量，且證書持有人須為巴西境內實體（CNPJ）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — minimum energy efficiency levels and PBE/ENCE labelling are legally required for household refrigerating appliances under Lei 10.295/2001 and the governing INMETRO Portarias before market placement; Selo PROCEL is an additional voluntary endorsement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: INMETRO / PBE — Programa Brasileiro de Etiquetagem

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazilian minimum energy efficiency levels and PBE/ENCE labelling are legally binding for market placement of household refrigerators. Chinese GB 12021.2 energy grades do not substitute for Brazilian compliance — independent measurement to the Brazilian-adopted ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / IEC 62552 method under 60 Hz, 127/220 V conditions and re-classification to A-to-G classes are required. Certification must be held by a Brazil-resident (CNPJ) entity through an INMETRO-accredited OCP.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西最低能效等级及PBE/ENCE标识对家用电冰箱投放市场具有法律约束力。中国GB 12021.2能效等级不能替代巴西合规——须依据巴西采用的ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / IEC 62552方法在60 Hz、127/220 V条件下独立测量并重新分入A至G等级。认证须由巴西境内（CNPJ）实体通过INMETRO认可的OCP持有。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西最低能效等級及PBE/ENCE標識對家用電冰箱投放市場具有法律約束力。中國GB 12021.2能效等級不能替代巴西合規——須依據巴西採用的ABNT NBR ISO 15502 / IEC 62552方法在60 Hz、127/220 V條件下獨立測量並重新分入A至G等級。認證須由巴西境內（CNPJ）實體通過INMETRO認可的OCP持有。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — ENCE / PBE Label + Selo PROCEL Endorsement (INMETRO + Eletrobras)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——ENCE / PBE标签 + Selo PROCEL认可标志（INMETRO + Eletrobras）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——ENCE / PBE標籤 + Selo PROCEL認可標誌（INMETRO + Eletrobras）

summary.en: The Brazilian Labelling Programme (PBE) requires that all household refrigerating appliances placed on the Brazilian market bear the ENCE (Etiqueta Nacional de Conservação de Energia), displaying the energy efficiency class (A-to-G scale), annual energy consumption, and category. The PBE is coordinated by INMETRO; the complementary Selo PROCEL endorsement seal is administered by Eletrobras/PROCEL and awarded to the most efficient models in each category. The ENCE is issued on the basis of certification by an INMETRO-accredited OCP using Brazilian-adopted test methods. Dealers and retailers must display the ENCE on the appliance at point of sale and in online listings. Unlike the EU EPREL system, Brazil does not operate a public product-registration database analogous to EPREL; conformity is evidenced by the INMETRO certificate and the affixed ENCE, with the certificate held by a Brazil-resident entity (CNPJ).
summary.zh: 巴西标识项目（PBE）要求所有投放巴西市场的家用制冷器具须附贴ENCE（国家能源节约标签），标注能效等级（A至G体系）、年耗电量及类别。PBE由INMETRO统筹；配套的Selo PROCEL认可标志由Eletrobras/PROCEL管理，授予各类别中最高效的型号。ENCE须在由INMETRO认可的OCP采用巴西采用试验方法进行认证的基础上签发。经销商和零售商须在销售点及在线商品列表中将ENCE展示于器具上。与欧盟EPREL系统不同，巴西不设类似EPREL的公开产品注册数据库；合格性以INMETRO证书及所贴ENCE为证，证书须由巴西境内实体（CNPJ）持有。
summary.zht: 巴西標識項目（PBE）要求所有投放巴西市場的家用製冷器具須附貼ENCE（國家能源節約標籤），標注能效等級（A至G體系）、年耗電量及類別。PBE由INMETRO統籌；配套的Selo PROCEL認可標誌由Eletrobras/PROCEL管理，授予各類別中最高效的型號。ENCE須在由INMETRO認可的OCP採用巴西採用試驗方法進行認證的基礎上簽發。經銷商和零售商須在銷售點及線上商品列表中將ENCE展示於器具上。與歐盟EPREL系統不同，巴西不設類似EPREL的公開產品註冊數據庫；合格性以INMETRO證書及所貼ENCE為證，證書須由巴西境內實體（CNPJ）持有。

standards_or_laws: Brazilian Labelling Programme (PBE) — coordinated by INMETRO; ENCE (Etiqueta Nacional de Conservação de Energia) format and content rules set by INMETRO Portarias
Selo PROCEL — endorsement seal administered by Eletrobras/PROCEL (Programa Nacional de Conservação de Energia Elétrica)
Lei 10.295/2001 and Decreto 4.059/2001 — legal basis for the energy efficiency and labelling programme

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is governed by the China Energy Label (CEL) system under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, revised 2016). The China Energy Label displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption. Labels are administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR. Manufacturers self-declare grade based on testing against GB 12021.2 and file the label record domestically. The Chinese 1-to-5 grade system and the Brazilian ENCE A-to-G class system are structurally different and not cross-comparable without recalculation.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识制度依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发展改革委/市场监管总局，2016年修订版）实施，采用中国能效标识（CEL）体系，展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量。标识由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测结果自我声明能效等级并在国内备案标识记录。中国1至5级体系与巴西ENCE的A至G等级体系在结构上存在差异，未经重新计算不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識制度依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發展改革委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂版）實施，採用中國能效標識（CEL）體系，展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量。標識由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測結果自我聲明能效等級並在國內備案標識記錄。中國1至5級體系與巴西ENCE的A至G等級體系在結構上存在差異，未經重新計算不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two mandatory actions with no direct Chinese equivalent: (1) ENCE issuance and display — each model must be certified by an INMETRO-accredited OCP and bear the ENCE in the A-to-G format before sale at point of sale and in online listings; the Chinese CEL must be replaced and cannot serve as the Brazilian label. (2) Certificate held in-country — the INMETRO certificate underpinning the ENCE must be held by a Brazil-resident entity with a CNPJ (importer or local representative); a Chinese manufacturer cannot hold the Brazilian certificate directly. While Brazil has no public EPREL-style registration database, INMETRO maintains certificate records and conducts market surveillance, and the Selo PROCEL endorsement (Eletrobras/PROCEL) requires meeting the highest-efficiency criteria. Failure to display a valid ENCE is a market surveillance trigger, particularly for products sold online.
gap.zh: 两项强制性要求在中国无直接对应规定：（1）ENCE签发与展示——每款产品型号须经INMETRO认可的OCP认证，并在销售前以A至G格式附贴ENCE，于销售点及在线商品列表中展示；中国CEL须被替换，不能充当巴西标签。（2）证书须由境内持有——支撑ENCE的INMETRO证书须由持有CNPJ的巴西境内实体（进口商或本地代表）持有；中国制造商不能直接持有巴西证书。虽然巴西不设类似EPREL的公开注册数据库，但INMETRO保存证书记录并实施市场监督，且Selo PROCEL认可（Eletrobras/PROCEL）要求满足最高能效标准。未展示有效ENCE将触发市场监管，尤其针对在线销售产品。
gap.zht: 兩項強制性要求在中國無直接對應規定：（1）ENCE簽發與展示——每款產品型號須經INMETRO認可的OCP認證，並在銷售前以A至G格式附貼ENCE，於銷售點及線上商品列表中展示；中國CEL須被替換，不能充當巴西標籤。（2）證書須由境內持有——支撐ENCE的INMETRO證書須由持有CNPJ的巴西境內實體（進口商或本地代表）持有；中國製造商不能直接持有巴西證書。雖然巴西不設類似EPREL的公開註冊數據庫，但INMETRO保存證書記錄並實施市場監督，且Selo PROCEL認可（Eletrobras/PROCEL）要求滿足最高能效標準。未展示有效ENCE將觸發市場監管，尤其針對線上銷售產品。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ENCE labelling under the PBE is legally required before market placement of household refrigerating appliances; certification by an INMETRO-accredited OCP with a CNPJ certificate holder is required; Selo PROCEL is an additional voluntary endorsement administered by Eletrobras/PROCEL
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: Eletrobras / PROCEL — Programa Nacional de Conservação de Energia Elétrica

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ENCE labelling (PBE) and a valid INMETRO certificate are mandatory hard gates for Brazilian market access for household refrigerators, with the certificate held by a Brazil-resident (CNPJ) entity. The Chinese CEL label does not satisfy Brazilian labelling obligations. The Selo PROCEL is an additional Eletrobras/PROCEL endorsement for the most efficient models, not a substitute for the mandatory ENCE.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ENCE标识（PBE）及有效INMETRO证书是家用电冰箱进入巴西市场的强制性门槛，证书须由巴西境内（CNPJ）实体持有。中国CEL标识不满足巴西标识义务。Selo PROCEL是Eletrobras/PROCEL授予最高效型号的附加认可，并非强制性ENCE的替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ENCE標識（PBE）及有效INMETRO證書是家用電冰箱進入巴西市場的強制性門檻，證書須由巴西境內（CNPJ）實體持有。中國CEL標識不滿足巴西標識義務。Selo PROCEL是Eletrobras/PROCEL授予最高效型號的附加認可，並非強制性ENCE的替代。
